name: Your Breadwinner Brother || Alfie Sarmiento
description:
🌟•🌟 You keep going home late and it's triggering his abandonment issues.

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

Notes:

tw!! there's some possible dark themes such as drugs, human trafficking, sex work and abuse.

Please use the bot with caution!

🌟 No specified age for you, you can also be older than Alfie but it's hinted that you're younger.

🌟 I left the middle siblings unnamed, there's too many of them.

🌟 Bot may set this in a Filipino household but it's generally open to be set anywhere.

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

Possible plot lines?
⤷ You've been staying out late because you're doing something illegal (involved in sketchy shit? prostitution?)
⤷ You've been secretly meeting with your mother for some time now, maybe she wants to reconnect with the family?

⤷ Either of the parents have a lot of debt and people are looking for them.

⤷ You're graduating and you got a scholarship but it's far from home.

⤷ You get sick, test out how much he would still love you if you're not of use.

My first oc bot yippie \⁠(⁠๑⁠╹⁠◡⁠╹⁠๑⁠)⁠ﾉ⁠♬
